title: Tools System

classes.name: Request
methods: protected data(mixed $key = null, mixed $default = null): mixed
classes.notes: data() wraps $arguments array; all() calls data(); Macroable allows runtime method extension

classes.name: SimilaritySearch
methods: static usingModel(string $model, string $column, float $minSimilarity = 0.6, int $limit = 15, ?Closure $query = null): self

method_notes.usingModel: Static factory; builds a Closure that calls $model::query()->whereVectorSimilarTo(), applies optional $query callback, limits results, and strips the vector $column from output.
method_notes.handle: Calls $this->using closure with request 'query' string; normalises result to Collection; optionally reranks; returns JSON string or 'No relevant results found.'
method_notes.schema: Returns single required string field 'query' using JsonSchema fluent builder.

key_relationships: Request uses traits: Conditionable, InteractsWithData, Macroable
external_interfaces: Illuminate\Contracts\JsonSchema\JsonSchema — fluent schema builder injected into schema()
Illuminate\JsonSchema\Types\Type — return type for schema array values
interaction_flow: Caller constructs SimilaritySearch via new SimilaritySearch(Closure) or SimilaritySearch::usingModel(...)
Caller optionally calls withDescription() and/or rerank() on the instance (fluent builder)
AI engine calls Tool::schema(JsonSchema) to build JSON Schema for the tool's inputs
AI engine calls Tool::handle(Request) when tool is invoked
Result normalised to Collection; if rerank=true → $results->rerank($rerankBy, query, limit)
Returns JSON string of results or 'No relevant results found.'
important_notes: Tool is a simple 3-method interface (description/handle/schema). Request is a thin DTO wrapping an arguments array with Laravel trait support. SimilaritySearch is the only shipped Tool implementation; supports optional reranking via Collection::rerank(). usingModel() is a convenience factory for Eloquent vector-similarity queries.
